languages.subtitle: Fili ʻa e lea fakafonua ʻoku fakaʻaongaʻi ʻi he app kotoa.
languages.search: Fekumi ʻi he ngaahi lea fakafonua
languages.noResults: ʻOku ʻikai ha lea fakafonua ʻe tatau mo hoʻo kumi.

phone.searchCountry: Kumi ʻa e fonua, kouti pe tomuʻa telefoni
phone.noCountries: ʻOku ʻikai ha fonua ʻe tatau mo hoʻo fekumi.
phone.countryButton: Liliu ʻa e fonua, lolotonga %{country} mo e %{callingCode}
phone.tooShort: ʻOku fuʻu nounou ʻa e fika telefoni ko ʻeni.
phone.tooLong: ʻOku fuʻu loloa ʻa e fika telefoni ko ʻeni.

phone.valid: Fika telefoni fakavahaʻapuleʻanga ʻoku kei ʻaonga

auth.onboardingTagline: Ko ha hoa malu fakatautaha ʻi he vahaʻa ʻo e "ʻOku ou sai pe" mo e "ʻOku ou fie maʻu tokoni."
auth.createSubtitle: Fili ha founga ke hu ai ki loto ke maluʻi hoʻo kalafi maluʻi.
auth.sendingCode: Ko hono ʻave ʻo e kouti ...
auth.signInFailedTitle: Fakangata ʻa e hu ki loto
auth.signInFailedMessage: Naʻe ʻikai ke mau lava ʻo fakakakato ʻa e hu ki loto. Vakaiʻi hoʻo fehokotakiʻanga pea toe feinga pe.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google ʻikai lava ke hu ki ai
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Fakaʻaongaʻi ha fakataha fakalakalaka fakalotofonua. ʻOku ngaue ʻa e Native Google Sign-In ʻi ha langa fakalakalaka.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Fakatauhoa he taimi ni pe hoko atu pea toki tanaki atu ia ʻamui ange.
auth.northStarBody: ʻE lava ke fakatupu ʻe he VL01 wearable ʻa e tafe malu ʻaki ʻa e taps mo e lomiʻi loloa.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Ko ho hoa malu angavaivai ʻi he mape mo e ngaahi telefoni.
auth.capybearBody: ʻCapybear lava ke tokoni ʻi he home mode, guardian mode, emergency mode, excuse calls, mo e voice support.
auth.remindersReady: ʻOku mateuteu ʻa e ngaahi fakamanatu vaivai.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Fakaʻaongaʻi ki he mape, ngaahi feituʻu fakatuʻutamaki, tuʻuta malu mo e SOS kakano.
permissions.locationBody: ʻVeryLoving kole ʻa e feituʻu ke mahino ki he kau tauhi fanau ʻa e feituʻu ʻe ala fie maʻu ai ha tokoni. Te ke lava ʻo liliu ʻeni ʻamui ange ʻi he Settings.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: ʻOku poupouʻi ʻe he ngaahi fanongonongo ʻa e ngaahi lesisita mo e ngaahi meʻa fakatuʻupakee.
permissions.notificationsBody: ʻOku mau fakaʻaongaʻi pe ʻa e ngaahi fanongonongo ki he ngaahi fakahinohino ki he malu, ngaahi fakamatala fakamuimuitaha ki he meʻa fakatuʻupakee, mo e ngaahi fakamanatu ʻoku ke fakaʻaongaʻi.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: ʻOku tauhi ʻe he feituʻu ʻoku tuʻu ai ʻa e tuʻunga ʻo
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving fakaʻaongaʻi ʻa e feituʻu ʻoku ke ʻi ai ki he mape ʻo e malu, ngaahi feituʻu fakatuʻutamaki, vahevahe vave, mo e SOS kakano. Te ke lava ʻo liliu ʻeni ʻamui ange ʻi he Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: ʻOku fie maʻu ke fakatokanga ki he malu
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: ʻVeryLoving ʻoatu ʻa e ngaahi fakamanatu ʻo e lesisita, ngaahi fakamatala fakamuimuitaha ki he meʻa fakatuʻupakee, mo e ngaahi fakahinohino ki he malu ʻoku ke fakaʻaongaʻi. ʻOku ʻikai ke mau fakaʻaongaʻi ʻa e ngaahi fanongonongo ki he ngaahi tuʻuaki.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: ʻOku fakaivia ʻe he maika ʻa e ngaahi telefoni ki he malu
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: ʻVeryLoving fakaʻaongaʻi pe hoʻo maika ʻi he taimi ʻoku ke kamata ai ha AI hoa pe telefoni malu.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: ʻOku fakaʻaongaʻi ʻe VeryLoving ʻa e Bluetooth ke fakatauhoa mo e ngaahi meʻa teuteu ʻNorthStar, lau ʻa e tuʻunga ʻo e fehokotakiʻanga, pea fakatupu ʻa e tafe malu mei he wearable.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving tauhi ʻa e tafe ko ʻeni ke maʻu mei he Settings mo e dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Fili ʻa e leʻo ʻo e hoa ʻoku ongoʻi malu taha ke fanongo ki ai.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Vahevahe ʻa e kakano mo e kakai falalaʻanga.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: ʻE lava ke fakalalahi ʻa e taaʻi ʻe nima ki he fakatokanga SOS mo e tauhi leʻo.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Faʻu ha ʻuhinga lelei ke mavahe ai mei ha tuʻunga ʻoku ʻikai fakafiemalie.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Kamata ha telefoni hoa ʻi he taimi moʻoni ʻi he taimi ʻoku ke fie maʻu ai ha tokoni.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: ʻAhiʻahiʻi ʻa e malu ʻi ha demo maʻulalo.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Tauhi ofi ʻa e ngaahi meʻa teuteu lolotonga hono scan.
jewelry.noDevices: ʻOku teʻeki ke maʻu ha ngaahi meʻangaue ofi NorthStar.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth ʻikai lava ʻo kamata ʻa e scan. Kataki ʻo toe feinga pe.
jewelry.scanFailed: Naʻe ʻikai ke mau lava ʻo maʻu ha ngaahi meʻa teuteu ofi mai. Vakaiʻi Bluetooth, tauhi NorthStar ke ofi ki ai, pea toe feinga pe.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth ʻikai lava ʻo kamata ʻa e scan. Vakaiʻi Bluetooth hu ki ai pea toe feinga pe.
jewelry.permissionDenied: ʻOku tamateʻi ʻa e meʻangaue ofi mai. Fakaʻata Bluetooth ke hu ki ai ʻi he Settings, pea toe feinga pe.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar fuʻu fuoloa pea toki fetuʻutaki. ʻUnuakiʻi ia ke ofi ange pea toe feinga pe.
jewelry.connectFailed: Naʻe ʻikai ke mau lava ʻo fetuʻutaki mo NorthStar. Fakapapauʻi pe ʻoku fakafonu pea ofi mai, pea toe feinga pe.
jewelry.emptyTitle: ʻOku teʻeki ai ke ʻi ai ha ngaahi meʻangaue ofi
jewelry.emptyMessage: Tauhi NorthStar fakafonu pea ofi ki he telefoni ko ʻeni, pea toe scan.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Kumi ha ngaahi meʻangaue NorthStar ofi mai...

home.subtitle: Dashboard ʻo e hoa malu
home.readyBody: Ko e leʻo, mape, siueli, mo e kau tauhi ʻoku ʻi ai pe ʻa e foʻi lomi ʻe taha.

map.finding: Ko hono kumi ʻo e feituʻu ʻoku ke ʻi ai...
map.title: Mape ʻo e malu
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go tomuʻa vakaiʻi; ʻMapbox ʻoku ʻi ai ha langa fakalakalaka.
map.updateFailed: ʻOku ʻikai ke mau lava ʻo ʻoatu ʻa e fakamatala fakamuimuitaha ki he feituʻu ʻoku Kataki ʻo toe feinga pe.
map.notRequested: Naʻe ʻikai kole ke hu ki he feituʻu. Te ke lava ʻo fakaʻata ia ʻamui ange mei he Settings.
map.permissionOff: ʻOku tamateʻi ʻa e feituʻu ʻoku hu ki ai. Fakaʻata ia ʻi he Settings ke fakatefito ʻa e mape malu ʻiate koe.
map.timeout: ʻOku loloa ange ʻa e feituʻu ʻoku ke ʻi ai ʻi he meʻa naʻe fai ki ai e ʻaman ʻUnu ki ha feituʻu ʻoku mahino ange ai ʻa e fakaʻilonga pea toe feinga pe.
map.savedEmptyTitle: ʻOku teʻeki ai ke fakahaofi ha ngaahi feituʻu
map.savedEmptyMessage: ʻE ʻasi heni ʻa e ngaahi feituʻu falalaʻanga ʻoku ke seivi ke vave ʻa e hu ki ai.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Fakaʻaongaʻi ʻa e ngaahi tali ʻoku fakatahaʻi fakataha mo e hoa ʻi he taimi ʻoku ʻikai lava ke maʻu ai ʻa e ngaahi tohi fakamoʻoni ʻo e netiueka pe Hume.
settings.privacyBody: ʻAve pe tamateʻi ʻa e fakamatala fakalotofonua ʻoku tauhi ʻi he meʻangaue ko ʻeni.

settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Tamateʻi ʻa e ngaahi fakamatala fakalotofonua kotoa pe?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: ʻOku toʻo heni hoʻo fakamatala fakafoʻituitui, settings, ngaahi fetuʻutaki ki he meʻa fakatuʻupakee, hisitolia ʻo e fepotalanoaʻaki, ngaahi fakamanatu ʻo e fakangofua, mo e sesi fakalao fakalotofonua mei he device ko ʻeni.
settings.deleteEverything: Tamateʻi ʻa e meʻa kotoa pe

settings.linkFailed: ʻIkai lava ʻo fakaava ʻa e fehokotakiʻanga

contacts.title: Ngaahi fetuʻutaki ki he meʻa fakatuʻupake
contacts.subtitle: Kakai falalaʻanga ʻoku maʻu lolotonga ʻa e feʻaveʻaki malu.
contacts.addTitle: Tanaki atu ha fetuʻutaki ki he meʻa fakatuʻ
contacts.name: Hingoa
contacts.empty: ʻOku teʻeki ai ke tanaki atu ha fetuʻutaki ki he meʻa fakatuʻupakee
contacts.emptyTitle: ʻOku teʻeki ai ke ʻi ai ha fetuʻutaki ki he me
contacts.emptyMessage: Tanaki atu ha taha ʻoku ke falala ki ai koeʻuhi ke nau mateuteu ʻi he taimi ʻoku fie maʻu ai kinautolu ʻe ha founga malu.
contacts.removeMessage: He ʻikai ke toe ʻasi ʻa e tokotaha ko ʻeni ʻi hoʻo fakamatala ki he meʻa fakatuʻupakee.
contacts.nameRequired: Fakahu ʻa e hingoa ʻo e tokotaha fetuʻutaki.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Naʻe ʻikai ke mau lava ʻo seivi ʻa e fetuʻutaki ko ʻeni. Vakaiʻi ʻa e fakaikiiki pea toe feinga pe.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Naʻe ʻikai ke mau lava ʻo toʻo ʻa e fetuʻutaki ko ʻeni. Kataki ʻo toe feinga pe.

friends.emptyTitle: ʻOku ʻikai ha taha ʻi hoʻo siakale malu
friends.emptyMessage: ʻE ʻasi heni ʻa e ngaahi kaungameʻa mo e kau tauhi falalaʻanga ʻi he taimi ʻe tanaki atu ai kinautolu.

emergency.title: Ngaahi meʻa fakatuʻupakeeSOS
emergency.subtitle: Fakalalahi pe ʻi he taimi ʻoku ke fie maʻu ai ha tokoni fakavavevave.
emergency.body: ʻE fakaha ʻe he meʻa ni hoʻo founga malu mo teuteuʻi ha ngaahi fetuʻutaki ki he meʻa fakatuʻupakee.
emergency.notificationBody: Kuo maau hoʻo tafe mai ki he meʻa fakatuʻupakee.
emergency.addContact: Tanaki atu ha fetuʻutaki ki he meʻa fakatuʻupake ʻi he Settings.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Kuo maau ʻa e konga ʻo e vahevahe ʻo e feituʻu. Fakafehokotaki ʻa e backend share endpoint ke ʻave ʻa e ngaahi fehokotakiʻanga hangatonu.

quickShare.title: Vahevahe vave
quickShare.subtitle: Kuo maau ʻa e feʻaveʻaki ʻo e feituʻu ʻoku vahevahe ai.

capybearTap.title: Capybear lomiʻi
capybearTap.subtitle: Lomiʻi tuʻo ua hoʻo NorthStar ke li ha lanu moli maluʻi.
capybearTap.body: ʻOku mateuteu ʻa e hala ʻo e ngaue ki he fakauaea ʻo e meʻa ʻoku hoko ʻi he BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: ʻOku hange ʻoku ke ʻikai ke ʻi he ʻinitaneti. ʻE ʻoatu hoʻo popoaki ʻi he taimi te ke toe fetuʻutaki ai.
errors.voiceQueued: Seivi ʻa e popoaki. ʻE ʻoatu ia ʻi he taimi ʻe toe fakahoko ai ʻa e hoa leʻo.
errors.voiceRetrying: Feinga ke toe ʻave hoʻo popoaki...
errors.voiceConnecting: Fetuʻutaki malu ki ho hoa leʻo...
errors.microphone: ʻOku fie maʻu ʻa e maika ki he ngaahi telefoni leʻo. Te ke lava ʻo fakaʻata ia ʻi he Settings, pe taipeʻi ha popoaki.
errors.billing: ʻOku ʻikai lava ke maʻu fakataimi ʻa e hoa leʻo ʻi he ʻinitaneti. ʻE lava ke ke hoko atu mo e hoa ʻi he ʻinitaneti.
errors.authentication: Naʻe ʻikai lava ʻe he hoa leʻo ʻo fakapapauʻi ʻa e fakatahaʻanga ko ʻeni. Toe hu ki loto pe fakaʻaongaʻi ʻa e hoa ʻi he ʻinitaneti he taimi ni.
errors.timeout: Naʻe fuʻu fuoloa pea toki tali mai ʻe he hoa leʻo. Vakaiʻi hoʻo fehokotakiʻanga pea toe feinga pe.
errors.network: Naʻe ʻikai ke mau lava ʻo fetuʻutaki ki he hoa leʻo. Vakaiʻi hoʻo fehokotakiʻanga, pea toe feinga pe hoko atu ʻi he ʻinitaneti.
errors.genericVoice: Naʻe ʻi ai ha meʻa naʻa ne taʻofi ʻa e ui leʻo. Toe feinga, pe hoko atu ʻaki ʻa e hoa ʻoku ʻikai ke ʻi ai ha meʻa.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ʻVeryLoving fie maʻu ke hu ki he maika ke malu mo AI ʻa e ngaahi telefoni mo e hoa.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving fakaʻaongaʻi ho feituʻu ki he mape malu mo e ngaahi meʻa malu ofi mai.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: ʻOku VeryLoving fakaʻaongaʻi ʻa e Bluetooth ke fakafehokotaki ki hoʻo NorthStar meʻa teuteu maluʻi.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: ʻOku ʻikai lava ke ngāueʻaki ʻa e founga hū ko ʻení ʻi he faʻunga ko ʻení.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Hokohoko ko ha sīpinga (ki he fakatupulaki pē)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: ʻOku ngāueʻaki ʻe he tuʻunga sīpingá ʻa e fakamatala loi fakalotofonua pē. Kuo teʻeki fakapapauʻi ʻa e ngaahi ngāue fehokotakí, pea ʻe kamata foʻou ʻa e taimi ngāue ko ʻení ʻi he toe fakaava ʻa e polokalamá.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: ʻOku hala pe ʻosi ʻa e taimi ʻo e fika fakapapaú. Kole ha fika foʻou pea toe feinga.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Kuo fuʻu lahi ʻa e ngaahi feinga ke hū. Tatali siʻi, pea toe feinga.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Naʻe fuʻu fuoloa ʻa hono fakapapauʻi ʻo e hū. Vakaiʻi hoʻo fehokotakí pea toe feinga.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Naʻe ʻikai lava ke mau aʻu ki he ngāue hū. Vakaiʻi hoʻo fehokotakí pea toe feinga.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Kuo ʻosi hoʻo taimi ngāué. Toe hū.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Naʻe ʻikai lava ke fakaava ʻa e mape maluʻí. Vakaiʻi hoʻo fehokotakí pea toe feinga.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: ʻOku ʻikai maʻu ho feituʻu lolotongá. ʻOku fakaʻaliʻali ho feituʻu fakamuimui naʻe tauhi mei he %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Naʻe ʻikai lava ke mau vahevahe ho feituʻú. Vakaiʻi ʻa e ngofua ke hū ki he feituʻú pea toe feinga.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Ko hoku feituʻu naʻe lekooti ʻi he %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Ko hoku feituʻu fakamuimui naʻe tauhi mo lekooti ʻi he %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: ʻOku tāpuni ʻa e ngofua ki he Bluetooth. Fakaʻatā ia ʻi he Ngaahi Tuʻutuʻuní, pea toe feinga.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Kuo tāpuni ʻa e Bluetooth. Fakaava ia, pea toe feinga.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: ʻOku ʻikai lava ke fakahoa Bluetooth ʻi he meʻangāue pe faʻunga ko ʻení.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Naʻe ʻikai lava ke mau maʻu ʻa e NorthStar. Tauhi ia ke ofi, vakaiʻi ʻa e Bluetooth, pea toe feinga.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Naʻe ʻikai maʻu ha meʻangāue NorthStar ofi mai. Tauhi ia ke ofi pea toe kumi.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Naʻe ʻikai lava ke mau fehokotaki ki he NorthStar. Tauhi ia ke ʻi ai hono maʻuʻanga ʻuhila pea ofi mai, pea toe feinga.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Naʻe ʻikai lava ke mau tauhi ʻa e feituʻu ko ʻení. Toe feinga.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Kuo fakaava ʻa e tā fika telefoní; naʻe ʻikai fakapapauʻi ʻa e tā telefoní.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Kuo kaniseli; naʻe ʻikai fai ha tā telefoni.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Naʻe ʻikai maʻu ha tokotaha fetuʻutaki ki he meʻa fakavavevavé; naʻe ʻikai fai ha tā telefoni.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Naʻe ʻikai lava ke fakaava ʻa e tā fika telefoní; naʻe ʻikai fai ha tā telefoni.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Naʻe ʻikai lava ke fakapapauʻi ʻa e feinga SOS fakamuimuí.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: ʻOku ʻikai maʻu ʻa e hoa leʻó he taimí ni. Toe feinga ʻamui ange pe hokohoko mo e hoa ʻoku ngāue taʻekinitanetí.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Fakatonutonu ʻa e tokotaha fetuʻutaki ki he meʻa fakavavevavé
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Kuo fakatonutonu ʻa e tokotaha fetuʻutaki ki he meʻa fakavavevavé.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
